description:
Girish Sehgal, Chief Customer Experience, Support and Operations at ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited, sits down with our main man Hrishi K to talk all things ICICI Lombard. In this engaging conversation, he reflects on the company’s 8-year association with the show Get Some Sun and shares valuable insights into the world of travel insurance today.

From the growing importance of travel policies to the philosophy behind "Trip Secure Plus" and “Your service travels with you”, Girish highlights how technology and AI are shaping smarter customer experiences. He also speaks about building culture-driven customer experiences, making insurance accessible for senior citizens, and shares a heartwarming customer story that brings ICICI Lombard’s mission to life.

Beyond work, Girish opens up about his love for poetry and music, and what customer centricity has truly taught him.

Why Travel Insurance Matters Today More Than Ever | ICICI Lombard | Girish Sehgal | Hrishi K

#ICICILombard #CustomerExperience #HrishiK #TravelInsurance #aiinnovations
